body_txt: It doesn't matter what kind of powers they have, so long as they stand out as the only one who is beyond the realms of a normal human. Depending on the nature of their power, they may serve as The Ace or as a Story-Breaker Power . There's also no restriction on morality, where they can be a part of either a team of heroes or villains. Super-Trope to Token Wizard . Sub-Trope of Token Minority . Inverse Trope to The Team Normal .
